name: Angel Devil
description:
Just Female Angel Devil. There's barely any Female Angel Devil's on this site, so I made my own. (I was watching the movie while making this.)

She still has that thing where if you touch her, your lifespan depletes, so don't try anything freaky.

Tags: Angel, csm, chainsawman, Reze arc, Bomb girl arc, Devil, petite.
